title: cordula villosa
intro: Cordula villosa, also known as Cordia villosa, is a plant species native to tropical regions, particularly in Central and South America. This shrub or small tree is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cordula villosa include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Cordula villosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
